calendar.description: Shared family and season schedule. Crab and charter run April through November, maintenance and family December through March.

event.title: Last day of commercial crab season
event.notes: Final pot pull and dockside sort with Tommy and D.J. Plan winter haul-out.

event.title: Bridget birthday dinner
event.notes: Crabs if she wants them. Her 44th.

event.title: Eastern Shore waterfowl hunt with Uncle Frank
event.notes: Out by 4:30 AM. Tommy runs the Saturday crab haul.

event.title: Bay Runner haul-out for winter storage
event.notes: Block the day. Bottom, zincs, condition survey.

event.title: Homebrew bottling day
event.notes: Bay Red Ale Irish red batch for the holidays.

event.title: Annual physical with Dr. Margaret Walsh
event.notes: Blood pressure and bloodwork. Losartan review.

event.title: Patrick birthday
event.notes: His 17th. The solo Bay Runner sign-off conversation.

event.title: Quarterly back appointment with Dr. Kessler
event.notes: Bring the pain log. Herniated L4 to L5 protocol.

event.title: Siobhan birthday
event.notes: Her 14th. Sailing crowd at the house.

event.title: Pre-opener Bay Runner safety prep with Tommy
event.notes: Coast Guard documented-vessel items, hull, electronics, 900-pot loadout.

event.title: Maryland DNR crab pot inspection deadline
event.notes: All 900 pots tagged and registered. License MD-CC-4471-26.

event.title: Commercial crab season opens
event.notes: First trip with Tommy, D.J., and Mike.

event.title: Connor first U-10 lacrosse game
event.notes: Tommy runs the Saturday haul so Jack can coach.

event.title: Charter season begins
event.notes: First booking through Pete Andersen, half-day rockfish.

event.title: Maryland Homebrew Competition submission deadline
event.notes: Entering Bay Red Ale and a new amber lager.

event.title: Patrick first solo Bay Runner morning run
event.notes: Signed off by Jack and Tommy. Half-day, light gear, weather permitting.

item.title: Open mic at Dockside Pub
item.notes: With Kevin Doyle. Bring the Martin.

item.title: Crew payroll run
item.notes: Tommy, D.J., Mike through Annapolis Payroll Services.
